ford_s_max_job_note_2080366260.text: Blade, transponder and frequency verified against Transpondery and Silca. Tool compatibility remains pending.

ford_s_max_job_note_de472c3e90.text: Blade, transponder and frequency verified for the facelift security family. Tool compatibility remains pending.

ford_s_max_job_note_2d98f82612.text: Transpondery lists S-Max 2015+ as Hitag Pro. Silca lists the second-generation S-Max with HU101 and 433 MHz. Tool and online requirements remain to be mapped separately.

ford_s_max_job_note_ad8fd855ea.text: Use only where passive start is confirmed. Key data is verified for the 2006-2009 security family.

ford_s_max_job_note_ebd6bf58ad.text: Use this record only where keyed ignition is physically confirmed. Key data is verified; keyed UK fitment is less common than passive start. Tool compatibility remains pending.

ford_s_max_job_note_650fb4d1a1.text: Use this record only where keyed ignition is physically confirmed. Key data is verified; keyed UK fitment is less common than passive start. Tool compatibility remains pending. Some key hardware varies within this year/build range. Confirm the original key, VIN and physical vehicle configuration before supply.

verification.notes: Duplicate wording is collapsed in this index. Each note remains traceable to the verified generation-specific records in models.json.
